MANOSABA-BASEMENT_EXPLORATION_EVENT.page:
You open the safe and take out the sword kept inside.
It is what you need to save Ema and the others.
Blade in hand, you head back toward the cells—when a jailor steps in your way.
Lose [red]5[/red] HP. Remove a card from your deck.
Defeat the jailor within 5 turns to keep the sword.
You flee in panic, pay in blood, and leave the sword behind.
Within the time limit you defeat the jailor and take the [gold]Ritual Sword[/gold] from the safe.
After five turns you are spent; you leave the sword behind and escape—you gain nothing.
